'''X14''' was the code name of a [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] agent in [[Kapp Dendo]]'s [[Commando Team One]] who served on [[Ciutric IV]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|339}}</ref> just prior to the [[evacuation of Ciutric]].<ref name="MR">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Mandatory Retirement]]''</ref> He kept a lookout for [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]]<ref name="CSWE" /> and was responsible for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] learning that the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] leader had arrived on [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="MR" />

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
